products.title: Cover Drive 18 Pro
products.description:
Co-created with Virat Kohli, the Cover Drive 18 Pro is a technical breakthrough for the modern batter. A breathable mono mesh upper, reinforced with synthetic overlays for toe protection. A PWR+LCK heel-lock collar that keeps the foot anchored through powerful movements. The Boom logo, engineered as a TPU shank for torsional rigidity and lateral stability. Expect to feel grounded at the crease and ready for high-intensity pressure.

Marketed by:
Agilitas Brands Private Limited, 02B-109, Roshni Tech Hub, Marathahalli Main Road, Lakshminarayana Pura, EPIP Zone, Chinnapanna Halli, Marathahalli Colony, Bangalore - 560037.
